title: The Interpretation of Dreams
author: Sigmund Freud
content: “Unexpressed emotions will never die. They are buried alive and will come forth later in uglier ways.”

title: On Liberty
author: John Stuart Mill
content: “The only purpose for which power can be rightfully exercised over any member of a civilized community, against his will, is to prevent harm to others.”

title: The Origins of Totalitarianism
author: Hannah Arendt
content: “The ideal subject of totalitarian rule is not the convinced Nazi or the convinced Communist, but people for whom the distinction between fact and fiction no longer exists.”

title: Self-Reliance
author: Ralph Waldo Emerson
content: “To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.”

title: Das Kapital
author: Karl Marx
content: “Capital is dead labor, which, vampire-like, lives only by sucking living labor, and lives the more, the more labor it sucks.”
